operations.summary: Set a scalar, object, array, or document field value at the selector.
Insert a value into an ordered document location.
Remove a value from a document when preconditions pass.
Move a value from one selector to another in deterministic order.
Replace an existing value while preserving explicit before/after proof.
Merge structured content under an explicit deterministic merge policy.
Attach annotation metadata without silently changing authoritative content.
Import an asset reference through artifact and capability law.
Generate content with declared generator, provenance, and evidence.
Record an intentional no-op transaction member with evidence.
